mapper.sql: select id, master_article_id, drama_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_notes, is_featured, click_count, last_used_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gb_master_article_dramas

select mad.id, mad.master_article_id, mad.drama_id, d.name as drama_name, mad.relation_source, mad.relation_type, mad.display_order, mad.confidence_score, mad.ai_platform_id, mad.ai_reasoning, mad.ai_metadata, mad.review_status, mad.reviewed_by, mad.reviewed_at, mad.review_notes, mad.is_featured, mad.click_count, mad.last_used_at, mad.del_flag, mad.create_by, mad.create_time, mad.update_by, mad.update_time, mad.remark from gb_master_article_dramas mad left join gb_dramas d on mad.drama_id = d.id
mapper.select: where mad.master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and mad.del_flag = '0' order by mad.display_order asc, mad.confidence_score desc, mad.create_time desc
select count(1) from gb_master_article_dramas where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and drama_id = #{dramaId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_master_article_dramas
master_article_id, drama_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_notes, is_featured, click_count, last_used_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{masterArticleId}, #{dramaId}, #{relationSource}, #{relationType}, #{displayOrder}, #{confidenceScore}, #{aiPlatformId}, #{aiReasoning}, #{aiMetadata}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewNotes}, #{isFeatured}, #{clickCount}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},

insert into gb_master_article_dramas (master_article_id, drama_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, is_featured, click_count, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.masterArticleId}, #{item.dramaId}, #{item.relationSource}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.displayOrder}, #{item.confidenceScore}, #{item.aiPlatformId}, #{item.aiReasoning}, #{item.aiMetadata}, #{item.reviewStatus}, #{item.isFeatured}, #{item.clickCount}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.delete: update gb_master_article_dramas set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_master_article_dramas set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
update gb_master_article_dramas set del_flag = '2' where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId}
